description_for_human: Get help with IT support questions including passwords, VPN, billing, software installation, and account access.
description_for_model:
Plugin for IT support knowledge base queries. Use this when users ask about:
- Password reset or recovery
- VPN connection issues or disconnects
- Billing questions, invoices, or duplicate charges
- Software installation or updates (Office 365, Teams, etc.)
- Email and calendar configuration
- Account access or lockout issues
- Multi-factor authentication (MFA) setup
- Network connectivity problems
- Any other IT support or technical help topics

The plugin searches a knowledge base and returns grounded answers with confidence scores. Answers include step-by-step instructions and cite sources.

functions.name: searchKnowledgeBase
functions.description: Searches the IT support knowledge base for answers to user questions. Returns detailed instructions with high confidence scores for well-documented topics.

conversation_starters.title: Reset my password
conversation_starters.text: How do I reset my password?

conversation_starters.title: VPN troubleshooting
conversation_starters.text: My VPN keeps disconnecting, what should I do?

conversation_starters.title: Billing issue
conversation_starters.text: I was charged twice on my bill, how do I get a refund?

conversation_starters.title: Install Office 365
conversation_starters.text: I can't install Office 365, what are the requirements?
